---
title: "In_Class_Ex03b"
format: html
---

```{r}
pacman:: p_load(tidyverse, sf, tmap, httr)
```

```{r}
folder_path <- "data/aspatial/acra"
file_list <- list.files(path=folder_path,
                        pattern="^ACRA*,\\.csv$",full.names=TRUE)

acra_data <-file_list%>%
  map_dfr(read_csv)
```

```{r}
write_rds(acra_data,"data/rds/acra_data.rds")
```

```{r}
biz_56111 <- acra_data %>%
  select(1:24) %>%
  filter(primary_ssic_code==56111) %>%
  rename(date=registration_incorporation_date)%>%
  mutate(date=as.Date(date),
         YEAR=year(date),
         MONTH_NUM = month(date),
         MONTH_ABBR = month(date,
                          label=TRUE,
                          abbr=TRUE))%>%
  mutate(
    postal_code = str_pad(postal_code,
    width = 6, side = "left", pad= "0")) %>%
            filter(YEAR == 2025)
```
